implementation_drift.description: I caught myself misreading 2 entries (S258937772100001X 'pulse pattern recognition' which doesn't contain literal 'pulse diagnosis'; nature s41598-025-19780-3 has 'traditional Chinese pulse' not 'Traditional Chinese Medicine'). Corrected the overlap counts in the same file mid-write. Honest about the substring-rule edge case here.

honest_note: arxiv 2602.17229 Bloom's Taxonomy linear probing on residual streams is THE direct substantive prior art at the mechanism level (discrete taxonomy + linear probe + residual stream). My TCM-specific 28-quality vocabulary would be a content swap, not an architecture change. Strong pattern continuing from prior rounds: the moment I think a specific source-domain mechanism would translate cleanly to LLM, I find a 2024-2026 paper that already implemented the abstract mechanism with a different specific source. Saturation looks tight at the mechanism-architecture level.
